scripts.build:wave1: tsx tooling/maintenance/run-with-cache-governance.ts -- 'tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-albertsons apps/ext-amazon apps/ext-target && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-albertsons build && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-amazon build && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-target build'

scripts.package:wave2: tsx tooling/maintenance/run-with-cache-governance.ts -- 'tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-costco && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-costco zip && tsx tooling/release/stage-package-artifacts.ts apps/ext-costco && tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-walmart && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-walmart zip && tsx tooling/release/stage-package-artifacts.ts apps/ext-walmart && tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-temu && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-temu zip && tsx tooling/release/stage-package-artifacts.ts apps/ext-temu'
scripts.package:wave3: tsx tooling/maintenance/run-with-cache-governance.ts -- 'tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-kroger && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-kroger zip && tsx tooling/release/stage-package-artifacts.ts apps/ext-kroger && tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-weee && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-weee zip && tsx tooling/release/stage-package-artifacts.ts apps/ext-weee && tsx tooling/wxt/reset-app-output.ts apps/ext-shopping-suite && pnpm --filter @shopflow/ext-shopping-suite zip && tsx tooling/release/stage-package-artifacts.ts apps/ext-shopping-suite'

scripts.verify:local-hygiene: tsx tooling/maintenance/run-with-cache-governance.ts -- 'pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm run verify:catalog && pnpm run verify:sensitive-surfaces'
scripts.verify:pre-push: tsx tooling/maintenance/run-with-cache-governance.ts -- 'pnpm run verify:local-hygiene && pnpm run verify:coverage && pnpm run verify:sensitive-history && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:contract && pnpm run test:integration'

scripts.test: tsx tooling/maintenance/run-with-cache-governance.ts -- 'pnpm run verify:catalog && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:contract && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:e2e'
